prompt: A clean two-panel meme on warm paper white background (#fffdf7), premium editorial layout with generous margins. Top panel labeled in small black text 'ON A SPEC SHEET': a flat, lonely line drawing of a graphics card icon in muted gray. Bottom panel labeled 'IN THE ROOM WITH US': a warm candid illustration of Texas builders gathered around a laptop at a meetup table, smiling, coffee cups, the orange AITX open-arms mark glowing softly on a sticker on the laptop lid. Bold black headline across the top reads exactly: 'You get a better sense of a person in person. Same goes for a GPU.' Accent details in AITX orange #ff4201 and NVIDIA green #76b900. Small co-brand lockup 'AITX x NVIDIA' in the bottom corner, AITX in orange, NVIDIA wordmark in NVIDIA green #76b900. Modern sans-serif, high contrast, print-quality, no clutter.
